text:
There was a big girl named Olive. Olive liked reading. She read all the time. One day she read a book about a brave squirrel. Olive loved that squirrel.

She drew pictures of the squirrel. Then she found an acorn tree. She climbed into a big oak nut. Nothing came out. She climbed some more. Nothing. Then, finally, an acorn! She took a pawful home.

When she'd finished reading again she felt proud. Olive stuffed the acorn into her sock. Then she slept. During the night she dreamed.

Something ate her sock. It was a huge red owl. It had tiny brown eyes. Olive woke up.

The owl liked nuts!

She dropped her sock onto the floor. The owl stared closely.

That owl liked acorns.

There was nothing to do.

So Olive ran. She ran all day.

Finally she woke up a cat. She told him about her owl.

The cat tutted.

That came home. It liked mice.
